message:
🐛 Fix set -e compatibility in start scripts (#338)

- Add `|| true` to lsof command substitution in start-dev.sh port
  cleanup so `set -e` doesn't exit when no process is found
- Replace `[ -n "$TAG" ] && git checkout` with `if` statement in both
  scripts to avoid set -e exit on empty TAG

Found during testing: start-dev.sh silently exited at port cleanup
because lsof returns non-zero when no process is listening, and
the command substitution inherits that exit code under set -e.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -72,7 +72,7 @@ if [ ! -f "$SCRIPT_DIR/web/package.json" ] || [ ! -d "$SCRIPT_DIR/cmd" ]; then
         echo "Cloning repository..."
         git clone --branch "$BRANCH" "$REPO_URL" "$INSTALL_DIR"
         cd "$INSTALL_DIR"
-        [ -n "$TAG" ] && git checkout "$TAG"
+        if [ -n "$TAG" ]; then git checkout "$TAG"; fi
     fi
 
     echo "Installing frontend dependencies..."
@@ -111,7 +111,7 @@ export FRONTEND_URL=${FRONTEND_URL:-http://localhost:5174}
 
 # Kill any existing instances on required ports
 for p in 8080 5174 8585; do
-    EXISTING_PID=$(lsof -ti :$p 2>/dev/null)
+    EXISTING_PID=$(lsof -ti :$p 2>/dev/null || true)
     if [ -n "$EXISTING_PID" ]; then
         echo "Killing existing process on port $p (PID: $EXISTING_PID)..."
         kill -9 $EXISTING_PID 2>/dev/null || true

@@ -73,7 +73,7 @@ if [ ! -f "$SCRIPT_DIR/web/package.json" ] || [ ! -d "$SCRIPT_DIR/cmd" ]; then
         echo "Cloning repository..."
         git clone --branch "$BRANCH" "$REPO_URL" "$INSTALL_DIR"
         cd "$INSTALL_DIR"
-        [ -n "$TAG" ] && git checkout "$TAG"
+        if [ -n "$TAG" ]; then git checkout "$TAG"; fi
     fi
 
     echo "Installing frontend dependencies..."
